title: Create Post Production
description: It's my mod pack is designed for playing the new update of Create either in survival or creative with a bunch of Poplar mods
body: --- Welcome to **Create Post Production**, a all-in-one Modpack designed for those who thrive in both creative building and survival gameplay. Centered around the **Create Mod update 6.0**. **Create Post Production** also includes a variety of complementary building mods that expand your options, providing you with a vast selection of decorative blocks, furniture, and utilities. With this combination of mechanical ability and aesthetic freedom, you’ll be able to create not just functional machines but artistic masterpieces as well. ## Key Features: - **Create Mod 6.0**: the center of the pack and one of the most popular mods. - **Building Mods included**: Access a huge selection of decorative and functional blocks to enhance your creations. - **Creative & Survival Play**: Whether you’re testing new ideas in creative mode or surviving in a world, this pack is perfect for any playstyle. - **Endless Possibilities**: Build, automate, and explore like never before with an expansive selection of tools and blocks to design everything from simple structures to complex automated factories. ---
